metadata.description: Deterministic, gate-backed spec-driven orchestration with the spin CLI — the spine never calls a model. 17 core agents, 11 gates, a measurement layer, model routing; optional specialist pack.

plugins.name: spindle
plugins.description: Deterministic spec-driven orchestration for Claude Code. The spin CLI is the spine (it never calls a model); slash commands orchestrate Claude around CLI-enforced gates. 17 core agents, 11 gates, model routing (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus), measurement layer, adversarial verification; optional specialist pack.
